subcodes.first_line: O friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Contemplate, if but a little, the tribulations endured by the holy ones of former times, such as the Prince of Martyrs, whose spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عبدالبهاء قدری در بلایای اولیای سلف نظر نما حضرت سیدالشهداء روح
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @Imam Husayn, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
